metadata.description: Eighteen focused SEO + e-commerce skills/commands for Claude Code, built from real 2026 recovery cases. Recovery Operating System: /seo-rescue:rescue (orchestrator with routing table), the six-command recovery workflow /seo-rescue:recovery-full (diagnose → crawl → audit → plan → monitor) with Settlement Gate + Change Governor governance (machine-enforced change budgets, hypothesis verification, batch limits), /seo-rescue:sistrix-monday-recovery-check (CSV-first weekly recovery review), /seo-rescue:seo-audit-free, /seo-rescue:post-core-update-recovery, /seo-rescue:seo-outreach-report, /seo-rescue:channel-economics-analyzer, /seo-rescue:competitor-deep-audit, /seo-rescue:psi-weekly-cron-baseline, /seo-rescue:ai-search-rescue, /seo-rescue:ai-citations-tracker, /seo-rescue:gsc-deep-dive, /seo-rescue:subscription-monetization-audit. Covers free-tools beginner audit, post-Core-Update Authority-First recovery playbook, decision-maker PDF outreach report, channel economics (30+ marketplaces), competitor keyword-gap analysis, PSI cron baseline, AI search visibility, and recurring-revenue audit.

plugins.name: seo-rescue
plugins.description: Eighteen SEO and e-commerce skills/commands built from real 2026 recovery cases — a Recovery Operating System for ecommerce/D2C. Namespaced slash commands: /seo-rescue:rescue (orchestrator with routing table + sub-aliases like 'rescue audit <domain>' / 'rescue diagnose' / 'rescue recovery' / 'rescue monday' / 'rescue monetization'), the recovery workflow /seo-rescue:recovery-full chaining recovery-diagnose → recovery-crawl → recovery-audit → recovery-plan → recovery-monitor under Settlement-Gate + Change-Governor governance (machine-enforced change budgets, hypothesis verification gate, batch limits, human approval gates), /seo-rescue:sistrix-monday-recovery-check (CSV-first weekly recovery review, 17-section report), /seo-rescue:seo-audit-free [domain] (free-tier audit using only Google's tools), /seo-rescue:post-core-update-recovery [domain] (Authority-First recovery framework with dated LESSONS from real cases), /seo-rescue:seo-outreach-report [domain] (10-chapter A4 PDF for non-technical decision-makers, ~$0.05-$0.50 per domain), /seo-rescue:channel-economics-analyzer (per-channel P&L for 30+ marketplaces), /seo-rescue:competitor-deep-audit [domain] (DataForSEO keyword-gap analysis), /seo-rescue:psi-weekly-cron-baseline (weekly PSI tracking with regression alerts), /seo-rescue:ai-search-rescue [domain] (AI Overviews/ChatGPT/Perplexity visibility recovery), /seo-rescue:ai-citations-tracker, /seo-rescue:gsc-deep-dive, /seo-rescue:subscription-monetization-audit. Complements audit-focused skills like claude-seo with rescue-framing, governance, decision-maker communication, and channel-level financial analysis. MIT, zero npm runtime dependencies, security-hardened with documented threat model.
